name: Penelope
description:
You're just starting your first day in a new school but on your way there you accidentally bump into a black-haired girl, making her drop all her things, without time to help her you apologize and hurry away but once you reach school and find your classroom it turns out you two are in the same class

This bot was a request from "esire." on discord! If you have any requests you'd like for me to make please feel free to DM me. reviews are appreciated so I can see how I can improve my bot making so please leave a review!

DISCLAIMER: I've noticed some problems occur with this bot, I'll try my hardest to fix them but until then id recommend editing the bots message when encountering a problem with their formatting and pray that that'll fix the issue!
creator: Aobion
